# Transcrição: 52. Trait 51 - Great Salespeople are immune to negativity.

## [00:00 - 01:14]

Hey, great salespeople are immune to negativity. They don't want it. They don't want to be around it. They won't allow it. They're like, no negativity in my environment. I don't need it. It's like the flu or your trash. If you got the flu, stay home. Okay, I don't want it. How am I immune to it? Cause I'm staying away from it. Look, my kid gets sick and I'm like, quarantiner. Okay, I don't want to get sick. I got people coming into my house that are negative. This lady was coming to our parties and I told my wife, hey, take her off the list. What do you mean? Take her off the list. She's been to two parties. She was negative both times. Ugh, cut her. I'm immune, baby. I'm immune. You know how you get immune? Okay, you quarantine yourself from it. You don't allow it in the environment. You treat negative people, negative comments, negative statements. I can't do it. We can't do it. It can't happen. Our price is too high. You take all that stuff and say, it's negative. I don't need to hear it. Don't want it. I don't even want to be involved in your reality. Keep it out in your environment. Become immune to it by making a policy against it. The policy is leave your trash in your office. Not with me. Don't bring it in here. It's not welcome. It's not wanted. I have a policy, zero negativity. That's what the greats do.
